subject: Project Update
body:
Hey Alice, just wanted to let you know the project is on track. We should be ready for the demo next week.

Best,
Bob

subject: Re: Project Update
body: Thanks Bob! I'll prepare the slides for the demo. Let me know if you need anything else.

subject: Meeting Tomorrow
body: Hi Alice, are we still meeting tomorrow at 2pm? I have a few things to discuss.

subject: Re: Meeting Tomorrow
body: Yes, 2pm works for me. See you then!
